data.description: The self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research. A built-in learning loop that creates skills from experience, improves them during use, and remembers across sessions.

markdown"><header><h1>Hermes Agent</h1></header>
<p>The self-improving AI agent built by <a href="https://nousresearch.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Nous Research</a>. The only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions.</p>
<div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap"><a style="display:inline-block;padding:0.6rem 1.2rem;background-color:#FFD700;color:#07070d;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none" href="/docs/getting-started/installation"><p>Get Started →</p></a><a href="https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/" style="display:inline-block;padding:0.6rem 1.2rem;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.2);border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none"><p>Download Desktop</p></a><a href="https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent" style="display:inline-block;padding:0.6rem 1.2rem;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.2);border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none"><p>View on GitHub</p></a></div>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="install">Install<a href="#install" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Install" title="Direct link to Install" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="windows-or-macos">Windows or macOS<a href="#windows-or-macos" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Windows or macOS" title="Direct link to Windows or macOS" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>To easily install the command-line and desktop applications, <a href="https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">download the Hermes Desktop installer</a> from our website and run it.</p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="without-hermes-desktop">Without Hermes Desktop:<a href="#without-hermes-desktop" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Without Hermes Desktop:" title="Direct link to Without Hermes Desktop:" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>For a command-line only install without Hermes Desktop, run:</p>
<h4 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="linux--macos--wsl2--android-termux">Linux / macOS / WSL2 / Android (Termux)<a href="#linux--macos--wsl2--android-termux" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Linux / macOS / WSL2 / Android (Termux)" title="Direct link to Linux / macOS / WSL2 / Android (Termux)" translate="no">​</a></h4>
<div class="language-bash codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-bash codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><span class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token function" style="color: rgb(215, 58, 73);">curl</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token parameter variable" style="color: rgb(54, 172, 170);">-fsSL</span><span class="token plain"> https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.sh </span><span class="token operator" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);">|</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token function" style="color: rgb(215, 58, 73);">bash</span><br></span></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<h4 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="windows-native">Windows (native)<a href="#windows-native" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Windows (native)" title="Direct link to Windows (native)" translate="no">​</a></h4>
<p>Run in powershell:</p>
<div class="language-powershell codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-powershell codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><span class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">iex (irm https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.ps1)</span><br></span></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<p>See the full <strong><a class="" href="/docs/getting-started/installation">Installation Guide</a></strong> for what the installer does, the per-user vs root layout, and Windows-specific notes.</p>
<div class="theme-admonition theme-admonition-tip admonition_xJq3 alert alert--success"><div class="admonitionHeading_Gvgb"><span class="admonitionIcon_Rf37"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M6.5 0C3.48 0 1 2.19 1 5c0 .92.55 2.25 1 3 1.34 2.25 1.78 2.78 2 4v1h5v-1c.22-1.22.66-1.75 2-4 .45-.75 1-2.08 1-3 0-2.81-2.48-5-5.5-5zm3.64 7.48c-.25.44-.47.8-.67 1.11-.86 1.41-1.25 2.06-1.45 3.23-.02.05-.02.11-.02.17H5c0-.06 0-.13-.02-.17-.2-1.17-.59-1.83-1.45-3.23-.2-.31-.42-.67-.67-1.11C2.44 6.78 2 5.65 2 5c0-2.2 2.02-4 4.5-4 1.22 0 2.36.42 3.22 1.19C10.55 2.94 11 3.94 11 5c0 .66-.44 1.78-.86 2.48zM4 14h5c-.23 1.14-1.3 2-2.5 2s-2.27-.86-2.5-2z"></path></svg></span>Fastest path to a working agent</div><div class="admonitionContent_BuS1"><p>After installing, run <code>hermes setup --portal</code> — one OAuth covers a model plus all four Tool Gateway tools (web search, image generation, TTS, browser). See <a class="" href="/docs/integrations/nous-portal">Nous Portal</a>.</p></div></div>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="what-is-hermes-agent">What is Hermes Agent?<a href="#what-is-hermes-agent" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to What is Hermes Agent?" title="Direct link to What is Hermes Agent?" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>It's not a coding copilot tethered to an IDE or a chatbot wrapper around a single API. It's an <strong>autonomous agent</strong> that gets more capable the longer it runs. It lives wherever you put it — a $5 VPS, a GPU cluster, or serverless infrastructure (Daytona, Modal) that costs nearly nothing when idle. Talk to it from Telegram while it works on a cloud VM you never SSH into yourself. It's not tied to your laptop.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="quick-links">Quick Links<a href="#quick-links" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Quick Links" title="Direct link to Quick Links" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<table><thead><tr><th></th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>🚀 <strong><a class="" href="/docs/getting-started/installation">Installation</a></strong></td><td>Install in 60 seconds on Linux, macOS, WSL2, or native Windows</td></tr><tr><td>📖 <strong><a class="" href="/docs/getting-started/quickstart">Quickstart Tutorial</a></strong></td><td>Your first conversation and key features to try</td></tr><tr><td>🗺️ <strong><a class="" href="/docs/getting-started/learning-path">Learning Path</a></strong></td><td>Find the right docs for your experience level</td></tr><tr><td>⚙️ <strong><a href="/docs/guides/use-voice-mode-with-hermes">Use Voice Mode with Hermes</a></strong></td><td>Hands-on setup and usage patterns for Hermes voice workflows</td></tr><tr><td>🎭 <strong><a class="" Practices</a></strong></td><td>Quick wins to get the most out of Hermes</td></tr><tr><td>🏗️ <strong><a class="" href="/docs/developer-guide/architecture">Architecture</a></strong></td><td>How it works under the hood</td></tr><tr><td>❓ <strong><a class="" href="/docs/reference/faq">FAQ & Troubleshooting</a></strong></td><td>Common questions and solutions</td></tr></tbody></table>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="key-features">Key Features<a href="#key-features" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Key Features" title="Direct link to Key Features" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<ul>
<li class=""><strong>A closed learning loop</strong> — Agent-curated memory with periodic nudges, autonomous skill creation, skill self-improvement during use, FTS5 cross-session recall with LLM summarization, and <a href="https://github.com/plastic-labs/honcho" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Honcho</a> dialectic user modeling</li>
<li class=""><strong>Runs anywhere, not just your laptop</strong> — 6 terminal backends: local, Docker, SSH, Daytona, Singularity, Modal. Daytona and Modal offer serverless persistence — your environment hibernates when idle, costing nearly nothing</li>
<li class=""><strong>Lives where you do</strong> — CLI, Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Matrix, Mattermost, Email, SMS, DingTalk, Feishu, WeCom, Weixin, QQ Bot, Yuanbao, BlueBubbles, Home Assistant, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, and more — 20+ platforms from one gateway</li>
<li class=""><strong>Built by model trainers</strong> — Created by <a href="https://nousresearch.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Nous Research</a>, the lab behind Hermes, Nomos, and Psyche. Works with <a href="https://portal.nousresearch.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Nous Portal</a>, <a href="https://openrouter.ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">OpenRouter</a>, OpenAI, or any endpoint</li>
<li class=""><strong>Scheduled automations</strong> — Built-in cron with delivery to any platform</li>
<li class=""><strong>Delegates & parallelizes</strong> — Spawn isolated subagents for parallel workstreams. Programmatic Tool Calling via <code>execute_code</code> collapses multi-step pipelines into single inference calls</li>
<li class=""><strong>Open standard skills</strong> — Compatible with <a href="https://agentskills.io" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">agentskills.io</a>. Skills are portable, shareable, and community-contributed via the Skills Hub</li>
<li class=""><strong>Full web control</strong> — Search, extract, browse, vision, image generation, TTS — one subscription via <a class="" href="/docs/integrations/nous-portal">Nous Portal</a> bundles all of them</li>
<li class=""><strong>MCP support</strong> — Connect to any MCP server for extended tool capabilities</li>
<li class=""><strong>Research-ready</strong> — Batch processing, trajectory export, RL training with Atropos. Built by <a href="https://nousresearch.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Nous Research</a> — the lab behind Hermes, Nomos, and Psyche models</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="for-llms-and-coding-agents">For LLMs and coding agents<a href="#for-llms-and-coding-agents" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to For LLMs and coding agents" title="Direct link to For LLMs and coding agents" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Machine-readable entry points to this documentation:</p>
<ul>
<li class=""><strong><a href="/docs/assets/files/llms-d4972c57170916efd83766ae50c3bb3d.txt" target="_blank" class=""><code>/llms.txt</code></a></strong> — curated index of every doc page with short descriptions. ~17 KB, safe to load into an LLM context.</li>
<li class=""><strong><a href="/docs/assets/files/llms-full-1fd95a836e3a50458dd176331d7e8437.txt" target="_blank" class=""><code>/llms-full.txt</code></a></strong> — every doc page concatenated into a single markdown file for one-shot ingestion. ~1.8 MB.</li>
</ul>
<p>Both files also resolve at <code>/docs/llms.txt</code> and <code>/docs/llms-full.txt</code>. Generated fresh on every deploy.</p></div><footer class="theme-doc-footer docusaurus-mt-lg"><div class="row margin-top--sm theme-doc-footer-edit-meta-row"><div class="col noPrint_WFHX"><a metadata.description: The self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research. A built-in learning loop that creates skills from experience, improves them during use, and remembers across sessions.
